name: PortfolioV1
description: My personal portfolio showcasing projects and experiments with modern UI, animations, and full-stack development.

name: Greenado
description: Simple website built to practice frontend design using HTML and TailwindCSS.

name: ThoughtShare
description: A social platform where users can register, post thoughts, edit, delete, and interact through likes.

name: Qrious
description: Custom QR code generator application that allows users to create, customize, and download QR codes through a simple interface.

name: NASA Dashboard
description: Interactive dashboard built with React to explore NASA APIs including APOD, Mars Rover photos, Near-Earth Objects, and EPIC Earth imagery with filtering and date-based search.

name: PrimeVision
description: Streaming-inspired UI project focused on entertainment discovery and responsive interfaces.

name: QueueWatch
description: Telegram bot built for monitoring HPC Slurm jobs, sending real-time status updates, notifications, and logs directly to users.

name: ANPR
description: Automatic Number Plate Recognition project using computer vision techniques.

name: Video Player
description: Custom video player implementation exploring media playback controls and UX.

name: Sync Watch
description: Local watch party application that allows users to sync and watch their own media files together in real time with shared playback controls.
